text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking along the<n>street back to
my place...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: GYAAAHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Dang it... Messed up again...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, when'd you get here, minion?!<n>Your timin's
perfect! Help me with my<n>gate trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I assume that scream just now was<n>the sound
of her struggling with<n>training, so I decide to help
her out.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
When I get into the gate, you give me<n>the signal
to start. Got it?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: All riiiiight... I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Gimme the signal! The signal, dang it!<n>Come on,
c'mon, c'mon!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: GWEH?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Surprised by her yelp, I rush over to<n>find... Shinko
Windy's foot stuck in a<n>deep hole at the starting
line. She's<n>sprawled dramatically across the
ground.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Grrrr... DANG IT! Why do I keep<n>fallin'?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
And after all that fidgetin' I did to<n>build up power!
GAH!
choice_data_list: I think the fidgeting might be the problem...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! The fidgetin' is proof<n>I'm gettin'
fired up to run like the<n>wind! Plus it helps with
gettin' off to a<n>good start!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That puts all eyes on me! And that's<n>when I
chomp down hard on first<n>place! That's the
perfect race, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While it's true that a competitive spirit<n>is vital for
racing, her fidgeting feet<n>are what dug the hole
that tripped her<n>up and bungled her all-important
start.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...I need to persuade her to look at it in<n>a different
light.
choice_data_list: I think you could do better.
I think you could do better.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Whatcha tryin' to say?!
choice_data_list:
If you save all that fire for after the gates open,
people are gonna go wild.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I explain that people get caught off<n>guard by
unpredictable surprises, and<n>that she'd look
cooler if she kept her<n>competitiveness under
wraps until the<n>race was underway.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Competitive spirit... lookin' cool...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Huh? She's awfully quiet. Maybe<n>she's
nervous.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the gates are open! Who will<n>make the first
move?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAHHHHH! COMPETITIVE<n>SPIRIIIIIT!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
What's with that fighting spirit?!<n>Wasn't she
totally silent a second<n>ago?! She's so cool!
Wow!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Guess I'll have to give it a<n>shot, if ya
insist!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm in the gate. Gotta<n>suppress the
fidgets... Stay cooool!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: GRAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: I did it! I didn't trip up! Hey, hey! How<n>was I?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Mehehe! I like this trainin'! Imma do it<n>like a
hundred times!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! So you're gonna get to<n>witness me
being cool a hundred<n>more times! Aren't you
lucky!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...Unable to say no to her beaming<n>smile, I stay
with her until she wears<n>herself out.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: GAHHHHH?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Ack... Awww...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: I'm... fine, but... I think... Imma call it...<n>a day...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She runs off in tears from the sheer<n>pain.
